customBotIdentity.title: Bot Identity
customBotIdentity.subtitle: Run Rankoon in this server through your own Discord bot application.
customBotIdentity.unavailableHint: This Rankoon instance does not allow Custom Bot Identity for this server.
customBotIdentity.capacityTitle: Custom Bot Identity is at capacity
customBotIdentity.capacityHint: Custom Bot Identity is currently at capacity on this Rankoon instance.
customBotIdentity.stepCreate: Create a Discord application and bot in the Discord Developer Portal.
customBotIdentity.stepIntents: Enable Server Members Intent and Message Content Intent.
customBotIdentity.stepToken: Store the bot token securely below.
customBotIdentity.stepInstall: Install the bot in this server.
customBotIdentity.stepActivate: Check the connection, then activate the identity.
customBotIdentity.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this custom bot and return to the official Rankoon bot?
customBotIdentity.confirmDelete: Delete this custom bot identity and its stored token?
customBotIdentity.error: Bot identity action could not be completed.
